title: chrysanthemum cilicium
intro: Chrysanthemum cilicium, also known as the Cretan chrysanthemum or Golden Marguerite, is an herbaceous perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum cilicium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Chrysanthemum cilicium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
